# cloudpilotai_gke_cluster (Data Source)

Retrieves information about an existing GKE cluster registered with CloudPilot AI.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudpilotai_gke_cluster" "production" {
  cluster_name = "production-gke"
  region       = "us-central1"
  cluster_uid  = "kube-system-namespace-uid"
}

output "cluster_status" {
  value = data.cloudpilotai_gke_cluster.production.status
}

output "agent_version" {
  value = data.cloudpilotai_gke_cluster.production.agent_version
}

output "onboard_manifest_version" {
  value = data.cloudpilotai_gke_cluster.production.onboard_manifest_version
}

output "need_upgrade" {
  value = data.cloudpilotai_gke_cluster.production.need_upgrade
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `cluster_id` (String) CloudPilot cluster identifier. When provided, this override is used directly and the data source does not derive the default ID from cluster_name, region, and cluster_uid.
- `cluster_location` (String) Optional GKE location override for zonal clusters.
- `cluster_name` (String) Name of the GKE cluster. Required when cluster_id is not provided; otherwise read from the CloudPilot cluster record.
- `cluster_uid` (String) Kubernetes cluster UID used to derive the default CloudPilot cluster ID. For GKE, this should match the kube-system namespace UID returned by `kubectl get ns kube-system -o jsonpath='{.metadata.uid}'`. Required when cluster_id is not provided.
- `region` (String) GCP region where the GKE cluster is located. Required when cluster_id is not provided; otherwise read from the CloudPilot cluster record.

### Read-Only

- `agent_version` (String) Version of the CloudPilot AI agent installed on the cluster.
- `cloud_provider` (String) Cloud provider of the cluster (for example 'gcp').
- `need_upgrade` (Boolean) Whether CloudPilot currently reports that this cluster needs an upgrade.
- `onboard_manifest_version` (String) Latest CloudPilot onboard manifest version reported by the service.
- `rebalance_enable` (Boolean) Whether rebalancing is enabled for this cluster.
- `status` (String) Current status of the cluster: 'online', 'offline', or 'demo'.
